input.prompt:
Locked camera, full-frame view of a blank cream sketchbook page. NO visible pencil, NO visible hand.

PHASED ACTION — strokes building IN DRAWING ORDER:

[0.0 – 1.2s]: Pencil OUTLINE strokes appear in drawing order: head-and-shoulders contour, eyes, nose, mouth. Each stroke discretely. NO color.

[1.2 – 2.5s]: Outline continues — voluminous curly black hair shape, full trimmed beard, eyebrows. The drawing reads as a man in his mid-30s with curly hair, full beard, and a warm open smile, in pencil.

[2.5 – 4.0s]: Watercolor washes BLOOM in waves. Warm skin tone first, then darker wash for hair and beard, then dark crewneck shirt wash.

[4.0 – 4.8s]: Final shading details. The smile lands warm and genuine.

[4.8 – 5.0s]: Hold on the completed portrait.

Critical: real artist time-lapse. NOT a fade. The smile is the key feature — it must read as a warm open smile.

Constraints: locked camera. NO visible pencil or hand. Single continuous take. The clip MUST end exactly at the provided end frame.
